text: Upon entering this space, I am struck by the stark contrast between the sterile, modern architecture outside and the vibrant, digitally-lit exhibition within. The glass wall presents both a literal and figurative barrier, inviting curiosity about what lies beyond, while subtly creating a sense of separation. I sense anticipation mixed with self-consciousness, as though I am about to encounter concepts or artifacts that might challenge my ideas about innovation, visibility, and human interaction.
